name: Picross
description: Nintendo-associated nonogram puzzle series built around revealing pictures by solving numbered grid logic puzzles.

eras.title: Mario Picross Era
eras.description: The Nintendo Picross identity begins through Mario-branded Game Boy and Super Famicom releases.

eras.title: DS Revival Era
eras.description: Picross returns through DS and 3DS releases, including the Picross 3D branch.

eras.title: Digital Puzzle Era
eras.description: Jupiter continues Picross through digital releases and themed puzzle collections.
